svg.text: Packet Forwarding Flow (After MAC Learning Complete)
VM1 @ VTEP1 sends packet to VM2 @ VTEP2

g.text: 1. Lookup MAC DD:EE:FF in MAC table (learned from EVPN)
Underlay IP Network routes packet from 10.0.0.1 to 10.0.0.2
3. Decapsulate: remove outer IP, UDP, VXLAN headers
Result: Layer 2 connectivity over Layer 3 network - No flooding!
